title: Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow sinks are now generally available
body: The Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow `sink` API is now generally available. Use sinks with append flows to write transformed pipeline data to external targets, including Delta tables, Apache Kafka topics, Azure Event Hubs, and custom Python data sources. See [Use sinks in pipelines](/aws/en/ldp/ldp-sinks).
